case_title: YOLANDA ALEXANDER VS. J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF YOLANDA ALEXANDER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: DAVID GRIGG IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES THE CASE IS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PAUL ALVARADO, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, YOLANDA AS TO DEFENDANT J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY ALEXANDER, YOLANDA AS TO DEFENDANT J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER, YOLANDA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT J. FLORES CONSTRUCTION COMPANY INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER DISMISSED AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF WITH PREJUDICE
